message:
fix(freeze): correct dup1/dup2/dup3 and to_propkey2 implementations

Fix compound assignment codegen bugs:

- dup1: [a,b] -> [a,a,b] - duplicate first item, insert before second
- dup2: [a,b] -> [a,b,a,b] - duplicate BOTH top items (was only pushing 1)
- dup3: [a,b,c] -> [a,b,c,a,b,c] - duplicate all 3 items (was only pushing 1)
- to_propkey2: convert sp-1 (index) not sp-2 (array) to property key

The old implementations were incorrect:
- dup2 read from sp-3 (non-existent) and only pushed 1 item
- to_propkey2 converted the array reference to string, corrupting it

This fixes simple compound assignment like `arr[0] *= 2`.
